Following the devastating fire at the Nash home, Bobby's fate remains uncertain; Athena embarks on a mission to uncover the truth; Hen and Karin engage in a heated custody battle; Christopher grapples with forgiving Eddie.
A trailer with millions of bees crashes on the streets of Los Angeles, unleashing a swarm.
Athena is tasked with safely delivering a prisoner to testify on a high-profile case; a light plane is hit by a swarm of bees and careens into a passenger plane.
Athena's only chance of surviving and saving everyone on the flight is to attempt to land the plane before it crashes and call on the 118 for help.
When it finally looks like Hen and Karen may get their foster license back, they are hit with another obstacle; the 118 races to the aid of a cheerleader involved in an infield collision.
The 118 is once again working on the spookiest night of the year and missing out on all the tricks and treats; Buck's Halloween decorations become a little scarier than he had hoped.

When a toddler falls down a pipe and becomes trapped, the 118 must rely on more than their skills to rescue him; old wounds are opened when members of the 118 race to the aid of a man dealing with a divorce.
When Athena is assigned a rookie to mentor, she begins to question her own abilities.
Things get messy for the 118 following a massive pipe explosion; Athena investigates the brutal beating of a man found behind a grocery store.
The 118 responds to a fire at a local animal shelter and races to evacuate all the animals; Maddie takes a 9-1-1 call that sets her on a quest for answers.
Following Maddie's mysterious 911 call, Chimney returns home to find his daughter alone and Maddie nowhere to be found.
The 118 responds to a call at a megachurch, where Bobby runs into his estranged mother; Buck is looking to expand his social circle now that Eddie has left.
Maddie's return to work proves to be more triggering than expected, as she may have returned too soon; Eddie struggles to adapt to his new surroundings.
After the 118 responds to several calls from the same person, Hen steps in to offer them advice; Eddie confronts his parents and takes a big step in his relationship with his son.
The 118 is called to a research lab that has been set on fire and becomes a biohazard.
Athena and Buck are in a race against time to rescue the rest of the 118 following the fire in the biolab.
Following the tragic events at the lab, the 118 must come together to lay their fallen hero to rest; despite her own grief, Athena re-investigates the death of a child to help a grieving mother.
Following an earthquake, the 118 races to the scene of several unusual fires and must figure out their cause before anyone else is hurt.
The 118, still reeling from their recent loss, is dispatched to a mass casualty event after a high-rise apartment building collapses; Athena and Chimney have to work together to save a familiar face.
